hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if [[ "$f" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|cjs|mjs|mdx|json|css)$ ]] && [ -f "$f" ]; then /Volumes/Gonzales/StockmansWallet/app-web/stockmanswallet-web/node_modules/.bin/prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; exit 0
